benefits.title: Gastronomy
benefits.desc: In our restaurant and bar, you will enjoy authentic Cuban food, along with vegetarian, Italian, and Mediterranean options. We offer everything from breakfast to dinner, with appetizers and snacks to take with you if you are on the move. Don't miss our Cuban cocktails, where each drink reflects the authentic flavor of Cuba. Come and taste the best of our kitchen!

images.alt: Wooden table prepared for lunch with white dinnerware, fresh flowers, and wooden chairs in the villa's restaurant.
Wooden Villa Los Reyes Bar Restaurant sign on a stone wall with hanging wine glasses.
Rustic bar at Villa Los Reyes with hanging glass goblets and wine bottles against light stone walls
Cozy view of the interior of Villa Los Reyes restaurant with arranged wooden tables and rustic decor

benefits.title: Mobility
benefits.desc: We facilitate your access to the best destinations with local taxis, shared taxis (colectivos), bicycle and motocross rentals. We also provide comfortable and safe transfers to and from the airport and other locations. Your comfort is our priority!

images.alt: Classic red American car (DeSoto) parked in front of Villa Los Reyes, available for transfers and tours.
Modern red car available for taxi services and private transfers in the Viñales area.

benefits.title: Trip Planner
benefits.desc: We offer personalized advice to organize your trip to Viñales or any destination in Cuba. We take care of managing accommodation, transportation, and activities, ensuring a comfortable and unforgettable experience. Let us make your stay pleasant and memorable!

images.alt: Top view of hands pointing at a map on a wooden table with coffee, an antique camera, and a passport

benefits.title: Laundry
benefits.desc: Our laundry service includes washing and ironing clothes, as well as cleaning shoes and bags. This way, you will always have everything impeccable and ready to enjoy to the fullest. We have a space dedicated to hand washing, ideal for those who prefer to do the process themselves instead of opting for the laundry service.

images.alt: Person holding a stack of clean, folded, and ironed clothes, laundry service at Villa Los Reyes

benefits.title: Massages
benefits.desc: We offer a Massage service designed to provide maximum comfort and relaxation during your stay. Our professional massage therapists are trained in various massage techniques, ensuring that each session is personalized according to your needs and preferences. Discover a rejuvenating experience in a tranquil setting. You can request your reservation at least 30 minutes in advance at our Villa.

images.alt: Close-up of professional hands performing a relaxation massage on a client's back.

benefits.title: Dance classes
benefits.desc: We offer traditional Cuban dance classes so you can immerse yourself in the rich culture of Cuba. With qualified and passionate instructors, you will enjoy an educational and fun experience. Choose between individual or group classes, adapted to your level and time. Don't miss the opportunity to enrich your stay with the flavor of Cuba!

images.alt: Close-up of the feet of several dancers with dance shoes during a traditional Cuban rhythms class.
